---
title: Talks
format: html
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| results: asis

library(yaml)

# Read talks data
talks <- yaml::read_yaml("data/talks.yml")

# Loop through each talk
for (talk in talks) {

  # Title
  cat("### ", talk$title, "\n\n")

  # Metadata (event • location • year)
  meta <- talk$event

  if (!is.null(talk$location)) {
    meta <- paste(meta, talk$location, sep = " • ")
  }

  if (!is.null(talk$year)) {
    meta <- paste(meta, talk$year, sep = " • ")
  }

  cat(meta, "\n\n")

  # Description
  if (!is.null(talk$description)) {
    cat(talk$description, "\n\n")
  }

  # Links
  if (!is.null(talk$links)) {

    cat("**Links:** ")

    link_names <- names(talk$links)

    for (i in seq_along(link_names)) {

      nm <- link_names[i]
      url <- talk$links[[nm]]

      # Icon mapping
      icon <- switch(tolower(nm),
        "repo" = "💻",
        "slides" = "📑",
        "demo" = "🚀",
        "recording" = "🎥",
        "page" = "🌐",
        "🔗"
      )

      if (!is.null(url) && nzchar(url)) {
        cat(icon, " [", toupper(nm), "](", url, ")", sep="")

        # Add separator only if not last
        if (i < length(link_names)) {
          cat(" · ")
        }
      }
    }

    cat("\n\n")
  }

  # Tags
  if (!is.null(talk$tags)) {
    cat("*Tags:* ", paste(talk$tags, collapse = ", "), "\n\n")
  }

  # Divider
  cat("---\n\n")
}
```
